# Sovereignbase

> Sovereignbase specifications and documentation.

This file lists key pages that help language models understand the site structure and important documents.

## Pages

- [Home](https://sovereignbase.dev/): Main site entry page.
- [QR](https://sovereignbase.dev/qr/): Tools to encode information (eg. recovery key) in to QRs. As well as scan and print QRs.
- [Hardware bound package](https://sovereignbase.dev/hardware-bound/): Device bound entropy for zero-knowledge/local-first application cryptographic bootsrap.
- [Dragonwatch module demo](https://sovereignbase.dev/dragonwatch/): Dragonwatch module in action.
- [Dragonwatch module docs](https://sovereignbase.dev/dragonwatch/docs/): Typedoc for dragonwatch package.
- [Peer to peer module demo](https://sovereignbase.dev/peer2peer/): Peer to peer module in action.
- [Peer to peer module docs](https://sovereignbase.dev/peer2peer/docs/): Typedoc for peer2peer package.
- [Peer to peer module spec](https://sovereignbase.dev/peer2peer/spec/): Peer to peer module specification (part of ANBS).
- [Convergent Replicated Struct](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-struct/): Convergent Replicated Struct (CR-Struct) specification.
- [Convergent Replicated Struct Documentation](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-struct/docs/): Convergent Replicated Struct (CR-Struct) Typedoc documentation.
- [Convergent Replicated List](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-list/): Convergent Replicated List (CR-List) specification.
- [Convergent Replicated Text](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-text/): Convergent Replicated Text (CR-Text) browser demo.
- [Convergent Replicated Text Documentation](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-text/docs/): Convergent Replicated Text (CR-Text) Typedoc documentation.
- [Convergent Replicated Text Specification](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-text/spec/): Convergent Replicated Text (CR-Text) ReSpec specification.
- [Convergent Replicated Map](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-map/): Convergent Replicated Map (CR-Map) specification.
- [Convergent Replicated Set](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-set/): Convergent Replicated Set (CR-Set) browser demo.
- [Convergent Replicated Set](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-set/docs/): Convergent Replicated Set (CR-Set) Typedoc documentation.
- [Convergent Replicated Set](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-set/spec/): Convergent Replicated Set (CR-Set) ReSpec specification.
